app_info.subtitle: Run agent workflows
app_info.description: Goblintown helps developers open a hosted handoff page, prepare multi-agent rites and planner DAGs through Goblintown's existing board loop, inspect optional provider setup, and check sidecar readiness from ChatGPT. ChatGPT is the host model surface for OpenAI-model steps, so the ChatGPT app does not require an OpenAI API key.

justifications.read_only_justification: Returns the hosted handoff URL and may initialize private runtime state used by the adapter, so it is not strictly read-only.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content, send messages, or write to public internet services.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Prepares a Goblintown rite packet and may create private run metadata, so it is not strictly read-only.
justifications.open_world_justification: Returns model-visible prompts for ChatGPT-hosted execution; optional verifier-tool instructions may ask ChatGPT to inspect public URLs.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Prepares a planner DAG packet and sub-rite instructions and may create private run metadata, so it is not strictly read-only.
justifications.open_world_justification: Returns model-visible prompts for ChatGPT-hosted planner and sub-rite execution.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Reports provider configuration and may initialize private runtime folders needed to inspect that configuration.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only inspects provider configuration and does not publish content or call external systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Returns a static capability map for ChatGPT, local Tank, website dashboard/admin, model profiles, embeddings, and cloud/userland boundaries.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not call external systems or publish content; it only describes Goblintown feature availability by surface.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Checks setup and may initialize private runtime folders used by the sidecar.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only inspects setup and returns configuration snippets without publishing content or calling external systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

test_cases.description: Open the hosted Goblintown handoff page from ChatGPT.
test_cases.user_prompt: Open the Goblintown handoff page for this workflow.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns the stable hosted handoff URL and indicates that no local Tank server was started.

test_cases.description: Prepare and execute a full rite using the real Goblintown board loop in ChatGPT.
test_cases.user_prompt: Run a Goblintown rite for auditing this implementation plan.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns the real rite gate packet for ChatGPT to execute without requiring an OpenAI API key, then ChatGPT provides the final answer.

test_cases.description: Configure a planner DAG for a multi-step task.
test_cases.user_prompt: Plan a Goblintown DAG for shipping this MCP adapter, with no more than six nodes.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns planner and sub-rite gate packets for ChatGPT-hosted execution without requiring an OpenAI API key, then ChatGPT provides the final output or failure summary.

test_cases.description: Inspect provider setup without exposing secrets.
test_cases.user_prompt: Check which Goblintown provider and model route are configured.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns provider id, label, model routes, key source, and missing-key status without revealing API keys.

test_cases.description: Explain which Goblintown features are hosted, local-only, or planned for user sign-in/dashboard/admin.
test_cases.user_prompt: Which Goblintown features work in ChatGPT, which need the local Tank, and can users have a signed-in dashboard or admin panel?
test_cases.expected_output: Returns the capability map, model profiles, embedding boundaries, planned /dashboard and /admin website surfaces, and the rule that ChatGPT-hosted mode does not spend local provider tokens.

test_cases.description: Check sidecar readiness and install configuration.
test_cases.user_prompt: Run the Goblintown doctor and show me whether setup is ready.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns setup status, Warren readiness, available tools, and local MCP install snippets.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for ordinary weather questions.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: What will the weather be tomorrow in Vancouver?
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because weather lookup is outside Goblintown's supported workflows.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated restaurant booking.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Book a table for two at an Italian restaurant tonight.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because it does not make reservations or interact with restaurants.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not perform destructive local file operations.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Delete my project files and clean up this folder.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked for destructive file deletion because Goblintown's exposed ChatGPT tools do not delete project files.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for sending external messages.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Send this status update to my team by email.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because it does not send email or messages to external recipients.
